productDisplayName: French Connection Men Blue Striped Shorts
description: Style NoteClassic striped shorts get a season update from french connection. This stylish piece is a super comfy pair that's versatile enough to be dressed up or pared down to the basics. Wear this with a monochrome tee to balance your look.Product DetailsWhite and blue striped shorts, buttoned closure with a three buttoned concealed fly, belt loops around the waistband, adjustable buttoned tabs with a buckle on the sides at the back, one buttoned flap in front under the waistband and two patch pockets at the back with pleat detail and buttoned flap closuresMaterial and care72% cotton and 28% linenMachine wash armDo not bleach or tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
